items.raw_desc: Szolár fólia Bestway Solar medence ponyva:The Bestway solar sail serves to maintain a comfortable water temperature in your pool, reducing evaporation of the infused water and active substances (e.g. chlorine) and protection of the water surface from the fall of dirt such as leaves, dust or pollen. The solar cover is designed for circular above ground pools with a diameter of 527 m, such as the Steel Pro MAX, Power Steel or Power Steel Swim Vista Series. It is made of durable polyethylene (PE) with a bubble structure that creates a greenhouse effect on the surface, so the warm water stays warm longer even when the temperature drops during the evening. Just place it directly on the surface, it will stay on the surface by itself and does not need any attachment.
